description: SRE role with SLA, on-call, observability, and most hiring details stated in text

job_description.title: Site Reliability Engineer
job_description.description:
Maintain payment infrastructure with 99.9% SLA. Shared on-call rotation across a 6-engineer reliability team.

Required: Linux, Kubernetes, Terraform, incident response. Observability tooling and runbooks are central to the role.

Salary: €95-115k.
